flows.name: CLI pull request analysis
flows.description: A contributor runs CodeDecay against a git diff and reads Markdown, JSON, or SARIF output.

flows.name: GitHub Action PR report
flows.description: The composite GitHub Action builds the CLI, runs analysis, and writes the step summary.
checks: cwd and output path behavior are documented

commands.name: full validation
commands.command: pnpm run lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build

invariants.name: No hidden cloud dependency
invariants.description: The OSS CLI must remain useful without telemetry, API keys, LLM calls, or hosted services.

invariants.name: Commands are explicit
invariants.description: CodeDecay must not run project commands unless they are configured and safety.allowCommands is true.

architecture.title: Private internal packages
architecture.note: Only @submuxhq/codedecay is published; @submuxhq/* packages are internal workspace packages.
